response.justification: Candidate has strong general software engineering experience but lacks the core mandatory requirements for this role. There is no substantial recent C++ experience (only a brief 6-month stint at National Instruments in 2014-2015), no Windows platform focus, no SQL Server/Oracle experience, and no Fixed Income, Capital Markets, or Investment Banking domain background. The profile is oriented toward web, TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang work.
strengths: Broad multi-language engineering background spanning 10+ years
Strong software craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, pairing)
Past C/C++ exposure at National Instruments on a developer-tooling product
concerns: No meaningful recent C++ experience (last touched ~2015 for ~6 months)
No SQL Server/Oracle or Windows platform development experience
No Fixed Income, Capital Markets, or Investment Banking domain exposure

key_factors.factor: No capital markets / fixed income domain
